title: ESDM Lab
tagline: Embedded systems and electronics development lab with microcontrollers, sensors, and IoT tooling.

equipment.name: Arduino Development Boards (Uno, Mega, Nano)
equipment.purpose: Rapid embedded prototyping and IoT development

equipment.name: Raspberry Pi (4B, CM4)
equipment.purpose: Single-board computers for IoT edge and ML inference

equipment.name: STM32 / ESP32 / RISC-V Dev Kits
equipment.purpose: ARM and RISC-V microcontroller development and evaluation

equipment.name: FPGA Development Boards (Xilinx / Intel)
equipment.purpose: Hardware description language prototyping and acceleration

equipment.name: Sensor Suite
equipment.purpose: Temperature, humidity, pressure, gas, motion, proximity, and optical sensors for prototyping

equipment.name: RF Module Kit (LoRa, Zigbee, BLE, NB-IoT)
equipment.purpose: Wireless connectivity prototyping for IoT devices

equipment.name: Motor Driver & Actuator Kit
equipment.purpose: DC, stepper, and servo motor control for robotics and automation

equipment.name: Power Electronics Evaluation Kits
equipment.purpose: SMPS, DC-DC converter, and battery management system prototyping

equipment.name: JTAG / SWD Debuggers
equipment.purpose: In-circuit debugging and programming of embedded targets
